title: graphorleons Dashboard
description: Health model dashboard for graphorleons — failures, latency, per-stamp drill-down

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{namespace="graphorleons", reason="OOMKilled", cluster=~"$cluster"}) or vector(0)
sum by (cluster) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{namespace="graphorleons", reason="CrashLoopBackOff", cluster=~"$cluster"}) or vector(0)

sum by (cluster) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster=~"$cluster", container!="", container!="POD"}[5m])) / sum by (cluster) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="graphorleons", cluster=~"$cluster", resource="cpu"}) * 100

sum by (cluster) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="graphorleons", cluster=~"$cluster", container!="", container!="POD"}) / sum by (cluster) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="graphorleons", cluster=~"$cluster", resource="memory"}) * 100

sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-swedencentral-001", container!=""}[5m])) by (pod) / sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-swedencentral-001", container!=""}[5m])) by (pod) * 100

sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-eastus-001", container!=""}[5m])) by (pod) / sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-eastus-001", container!=""}[5m])) by (pod) * 100

(1 - avg by (node) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle", cluster="aks-alwayson-eastus-001"}[5m]))) * on(node) group_left() (count by (node) (kube_pod_info{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-eastus-001"}) > 0) * 100

sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-southeastasia-001", container!=""}[5m])) by (pod) / sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="graphorleons", cluster="aks-alwayson-southeastasia-001", container!=""}[5m])) by (pod) * 100
